name: Ananya Sharma
feedback: The Generative AI Hackathon was a game-changer for me. Building an autonomous agent solution and pitching it to founders gave me immense confidence and a roadmap for my career.

name: Dr. Ramesh Babu
feedback: Techroxx organized an IoT & Telemetry Bootcamp at our campus. Their hands-on approach and embedded hardware kits kept students engaged for 3 entire days. High-impact execution!

name: Siddharth Mehta
feedback: It was a pleasure speaking at the Agentic AI Developer Webinar. The audience was highly technical, asking deep questions about multi-agent coordination. Techroxx's outreach is top-tier.

name: Meera Sen
feedback: We partnered with Techroxx for campus connect talent engagement. The quality of student profiles and their project portfolios was extremely impressive. We recruited 5 candidates immediately.
